meta.title: Purr·AI — On-device multimodal cat understanding
meta.description: Hear every purr, rumble, and breath. Privacy-first on-device VLM pipeline for cat health.

comingSoon.tagline: Hear every purr, rumble, and breath.
comingSoon.subtitle: Coming Soon

hero.tagline: Hear every purr, rumble, and breath.
hero.subhead: Multimodal understanding of your pet, running entirely at home.

privacy.intro: Your cat's data — from device to alert — stays entirely at home.
privacy.step3: You read on your own schedule · there is no cloud to watch
privacy.outro: We can't see any data, because we don't.

painPoint.headline: When you're out, what is she telling you?
painPoint.body: Cats don't cry for help loudly. They tell you with a low rumble, a pause, a posture. We hear them the first time they whisper.

alerts.intro: Six kinds of signals we surface proactively

01.title: Unusual whimper
01.body: Sustained low moan or distress call; we log the time and mood.

02.title: No eating ≥ 12h
02.body: Bowl hasn't changed; could be a health flag.

03.title: Vomiting / irregular breathing
03.body: Short coughs or repeated head-raises; worth attention.

04.title: Sudden sleep pattern shift
04.body: Day/night rhythm flips; could be an early sign.

05.title: Overgrooming
05.body: Repeated licking of one spot; anxiety or skin problem.

06.title: Missing ≥ 4h
06.body: Re-ID model hasn't seen her; we let you know.

abilities.intro: Four on-device capabilities, working together to understand her.

01.title: Multi-object detection & tracking
01.body: YOLO + ByteTrack — find every cat and hold her identity.

02.title: Re-ID individual recognition
02.body: OSNet — tell each one apart at home.

03.title: Pose & behavior
03.body: AP-10K keypoints — catch grooming, jumps, rest.

radar.intro: Eight dimensions of mood, observed over time
